remember: Students will be able to recall and list various tertiary and quaternary activities.
Students will be able to describe the characteristics of tertiary and quaternary sectors.
Students will be able to identify the significance of service sector in the economy.
understand: Students will be able to understand the differences between primary, secondary, tertiary, and quaternary sectors.
Students will be able to explain the impact of tertiary and quaternary activities on the environment and society.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of tertiary and quaternary activities to real-life scenarios.
Students will be able to analyze the role of tertiary and quaternary sectors in the economic development of a region.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the trends and patterns of tertiary and quaternary activities in different countries.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of technological advancements on the tertiary and quaternary sectors.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective: Understand the role of tertiary and quaternary sectors in the modern economy and their contribution to the growth and development of a region.
As per NCERT objective: Explain the characteristics and features of tertiary and quaternary activities and their impact on the society and environment.
board_exam_objectives: Identify and describe various tertiary and quaternary activities.
Explain the significance of service sector in the economy.
Discuss the impact of tertiary and quaternary activities on the environment and society.
Analyze the role of tertiary and quaternary sectors in the economic development of a region.
